# Time to invest and grow in Ethiopia
Join the growing list of global and regional companies that make Ethiopia
a leading FDI destination in Africa.
[Learn Why](https://investethiopia.gov.et/why-ethiopia/)
###  **EIC’s E-Service Platform is live!**
Invest smarter, faster, and online.
Visit our portal and start your investment journey today.
# [investinethiopia.gov.et](https://investinethiopia.gov.et/)
Your browser does not support the video tag.
## Why Ethiopia
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2065%2065'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### [Emerging and Connected Market](https://investethiopia.gov.et/why-ethiopia/#emerging)
In addition to being Africa´s second largest consumer market, we are a gateway to key regional and global markets.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2064%2064'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### [Growing and Dynamic Economy](https://investethiopia.gov.et/why-ethiopia/#fast)
For the past 15 years, we have been Africa´s fastest growing economy and a top location for foreign direct investment.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2067%2061'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### [Attractive and Enabling Business Environment](https://investethiopia.gov.et/why-ethiopia/#increase)
A government committed to improving the investment climate by implementing a business-oriented reform agenda.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2041%2066'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### [Young and Trainable Workforce](https://investethiopia.gov.et/why-ethiopia/#young)
We are Africa´s largest labor force. Our workforce of 56 million is young, eager to learn and productive.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2067%2052'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### [Expanding and Improved Infrastructure](https://investethiopia.gov.et/why-ethiopia/#expand)
Our economic growth and attractiveness to investors is leveraged by an ambitious infrastructure development plan.
![](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%2050%2067'%3E%3C/svg%3E)
### [Untapped Wealth of Mineral Resources](https://investethiopia.gov.et/why-ethiopia/#diverse)
A modern governance and legal framework to enable the extraction and beneficiation of our large and varied mineral reserves.
## Why Ethiopia
We are a growing attractive investment location for market, efficiency and resource-seeking investors looking to start or expand operations in Africa.
### Dynamic Policy
The government has committed to improving the investment climate by implementing a business-oriented reform agenda.
[](https://investethiopia.gov.et/why-ethiopia/#increase)
### Resilient Economy
For the past 15 years, we have been the fastest growing economy on the continent and one of the top locations for new foreign direct investment.
[](https://investethiopia.gov.et/why-ethiopia/#fast)
### Enabling Infrastructure
Our economic growth and attractiveness to investors is leveraged by an ambitious infrastructure development plan.
[](https://investethiopia.gov.et/why-ethiopia/#expand)
### Connected Market
In addition to being Africa´s second largest consumer market, we are a gateway to key regional and global markets.
[](https://investethiopia.gov.et/why-ethiopia/#emerging)
### Resource-rich Nation
Our modern governance and legal framework facilitate the extraction and commercialization of our large and varied mineral reserves.
[](https://investethiopia.gov.et/why-ethiopia/#diverse)
### Competitive Workforce
With a labor force of 56 million, we have Africa´s second largest pool of workers. Our workforce is young, fast learning and productive.
[](https://investethiopia.gov.et/why-ethiopia/#young)
